notes.body: Bonus Impact: FGU Overdue — maintain 0% overdue. If a location is not at 0% overdue, bonuses may be reduced or forfeited. Ensure all team members complete required training within the 31-day Five Guys window.

Implement: Orientation Checklist + Halo Effect & Suggestive Sales Policy. ALL employees must review and sign Halo Policy by Friday 5/8/26 5:00 PM. Email signed forms to Crystal (DM) by that time. New hires sign Halo Policy as part of onboarding. Standing: FGU Overdue Rate to 0% by 5/15.
Shopper Dashboard & FGX Info — print 2065 Shopper Dashboard & K.P.I., post on comm board, Crystal visiting locations this week to discuss in-store. Pair with Halo Effect rollout.
Nyatiek Keah is processed and good to schedule. Add to next available shift in Teamworx + CrunchTime; ensure orientation packet ready and Halo Policy signed during onboarding.
Incident #26-10106 (Jalapeno) returned to store. Add image of DC case label and respond. 7-day auto-resolve clock from 5/4 incident — respond before 5/11.
